testcase.name: User connects Google Calendar via OAuth
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user navigates to Settings and the Integrations section...........undefined And Google Calendar is not connected........................................undefined When the user clicks "Connect Google Calendar" in the Integrations section..undefined Then the user is redirected to the Google OAuth consent screen requesting the "calendar.events" scope..undefined When the user grants consent and is redirected back to the app..............undefined Then the Settings Integrations section shows "Connected" with the user's Google account email..undefined And no "Connect Google Calendar" button is visible..........................undefined

testcase.name: Calendar event created when meeting is scheduled with time and location
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user has Google Calendar connected................................undefined And an opportunity exists with status "IDENTIFIED"..........................undefined When the user opens the Schedule Meeting modal on the listing detail page...undefined And enters meetingTime "2026-05-01T14:00:00" and meetingLocation "456 Oak Ave, Seattle, WA"..undefined And the browser timezone is "America/Los_Angeles"...........................undefined And submits the form........................................................undefined Then the listing detail page displays the meeting date, time, and location..undefined And a Google Calendar event exists with title containing the listing title..undefined And the event start time is 2:00 PM and end time is 3:00 PM in the America/Los_Angeles timezone..undefined And the event location is "456 Oak Ave, Seattle, WA"........................undefined

testcase.name: Calendar event updated when meeting is rescheduled
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user has Google Calendar connected................................undefined And an opportunity has a scheduled meeting with a valid calendarEventId.....undefined When the user opens the Schedule Meeting modal and updates the meetingTime to "2026-05-02T10:00:00"..undefined And submits the form........................................................undefined Then the listing detail page shows the updated meeting date and time........undefined And the original Google Calendar event is updated in place (same event ID)..undefined And no duplicate calendar event is created..................................undefined

testcase.name: Calendar event deleted when meeting is cancelled
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user has Google Calendar connected................................undefined And an opportunity has a scheduled meeting with a valid calendarEventId.....undefined When the user clicks "Cancel meeting" on the listing detail page and confirms..undefined Then the listing detail page no longer shows any meeting information........undefined And the Google Calendar event is deleted....................................undefined And the opportunity record has null meetingTime, meetingLocation, and calendarEventId..undefined

testcase.name: Calendar event deleted in background when opportunity transitions to PASSED
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user has Google Calendar connected................................undefined And an opportunity has a scheduled meeting with a valid calendarEventId.....undefined When the user marks the opportunity as PASSED via the API...................undefined Then the PATCH response returns successfully without delay..................undefined And the associated Google Calendar event is deleted in the background.......undefined And no error is surfaced to the user........................................undefined

testcase.name: Re-authentication prompt shown when Calendar token cannot be refreshed
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user has Google Calendar connected with a revoked refresh token...undefined When the user schedules a meeting via the API with valid meetingTime and meetingLocation..undefined Then the meeting data is saved to the database..............................undefined And the response contains error code "CALENDAR_AUTH_REQUIRED"...............undefined And the response status is 401..............................................undefined

testcase.name: Disconnect removes token from DB regardless of Google revoke outcome
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user has Google Calendar connected................................undefined When the user disconnects Google Calendar via the API.......................undefined Then the response indicates success.........................................undefined And the GoogleCalendarToken row is removed from the database................undefined And the integration status endpoint shows connected as false................undefined

testcase.name: Meeting fields saved without error when Google Calendar is not connected
testcase.system-out: Given the user is authenticated with a PRO subscription.....................undefined Given the user does not have Google Calendar connected......................undefined And an opportunity exists...................................................undefined When the user schedules a meeting via the API with valid meetingTime and meetingLocation..undefined Then the API responds with success..........................................undefined And the opportunity record has meetingTime and meetingLocation saved to the database..undefined And calendarEventId remains null............................................undefined And no Google Calendar API call is made.....................................undefined
